sources.notes: Login/auth + SIGN-UP/registration HTTP surface, password encryption, device identity & request signing, keystore secure-storage crypto, realtime/MQTT + FBNS push, MSYS DM mailbox, media upload/configure pipeline, MobileConfig feature gating, Bloks action registry, analytics upload, and the feed/stories/reels HTTP surface. Sign-up adds account creation, phone/email confirmation, FB sign-up (folded into IgAccountsLoginApi), the age gate & new-user consent flow, and contact prefill. Every class pinned on a string literal verified globally unique in v433.0.0.47.68; not yet cross-version verified.

Feature-subsystem expansion: 26 subsystems (Meta AI/AI Studio, QuickSnap, Friend Map, Direct/MSYS/E2EE, RTC, Reels/clips, Stories, Close Friends, Shopping/Commerce, Branded Content, IG Live, Live monetization, Supervision, Family Center, Wellbeing/Screen Time, Notifications, Avatars, AR effects, Payments/FBPay, Creator subscriptions, Notes, Broadcast Channels, Auth/Login, 2FA/Security, Realtime/MQTT, Comments). Every signature resolves to exactly one class on this APK; members are A0x-rotated and not mapped.

Round-3 feature expansion: 20 more subsystems (Explore, Search, Feed ranking, Saved/Collections, Quick Experiment, Quick Promotion, Meta Verified, Account switching, Sticker/GIPHY, Music, In-app browser, Media upload, Analytics/Profilo, Zero-rating, Lead Ads, Tagging, Community Notes, Fundraisers, Bloks, Pando/GraphQL).
